title: Broadband and Bridge Infrastructure Act
summary: Expands broadband deployment and bridge repair grants for regional transportation corridors.

title: Rural Health and Hospital Access Act
summary: Expands rural hospital stabilization funding and community health access programs.

title: Workforce Apprenticeship and Labor Act
summary: Supports apprenticeship pipelines, labor training grants, and community college workforce programs.

title: Providing for consideration of the appeal of the ruling of the chair
summary: Sets the rule for House floor consideration of the appeal.
